subject: particles export crash
body:
Dear all,

I keep having warp crash to windows blue screen with message "MEMORY 
MANAGEMENT" but when running CTF/MOTION independently from picking I can 
recover the session and carry on. Picking particles is also stable, unless 
I tick the extract box, which is then very unstable and corrupts some files 
since then warp won't manage to start from a previous run.

I thought I could bypass this by exporting particles only at the end using 
the dedicated tool. However Warp is crashing during this manual particle 
export with the following message.

 08/07/2021 16:06:50:
System.Exception: Couldn't find rlnCoordinateX column.
   at 
Warp.Controls.TaskDialogs.TwoD.Dialog2DParticleExport.<>c__DisplayClass14_0.<<ButtonExport_OnClick>b__0>d.MoveNext() 
in 
D:\Dev\warp2\Warp\Controls\TaskDialogs\2D\Dialog2DParticleExport.xaml.cs:line 
233
--- End of stack trace from previous location where exception was thrown ---
   at System.Runtime.ExceptionServices.ExceptionDispatchInfo.Throw()
   at 
System.Runtime.CompilerServices.TaskAwaiter.HandleNonSuccessAndDebuggerNotification(Task 
task)
   at 
Warp.Controls.TaskDialogs.TwoD.Dialog2DParticleExport.<ButtonExport_OnClick>d__14.MoveNext() 
in 
D:\Dev\warp2\Warp\Controls\TaskDialogs\2D\Dialog2DParticleExport.xaml.cs:line 
571
--- End of stack trace from previous location where exception was thrown ---
   at System.Runtime.ExceptionServices.ExceptionDispatchInfo.Throw()
   at System.Windows.Threading.ExceptionWrapper.InternalRealCall(Delegate 
callback, Object args, Int32 numArgs)
   at System.Windows.Threading.ExceptionWrapper.TryCatchWhen(Object source, 
Delegate callback, Object args, Int32 numArgs, Delegate catchHandler)
   at 
Warp.Controls.TaskDialogs.TwoD.Dialog2DParticleExport.<>c__DisplayClass14_0.<<ButtonExport_OnClick>b__0>d.MoveNext() 
in 
D:\Dev\warp2\Warp\Controls\TaskDialogs\2D\Dialog2DParticleExport.xaml.cs:line 
233
--- End of stack trace from previous location where exception was thrown ---
   at System.Runtime.ExceptionServices.ExceptionDispatchInfo.Throw()
   at 
System.Runtime.CompilerServices.TaskAwaiter.HandleNonSuccessAndDebuggerNotification(Task 
task)
   at 
Warp.Controls.TaskDialogs.TwoD.Dialog2DParticleExport.<ButtonExport_OnClick>d__14.MoveNext() 
in 
D:\Dev\warp2\Warp\Controls\TaskDialogs\2D\Dialog2DParticleExport.xaml.cs:line 
571
--- End of stack trace from previous location where exception was thrown ---
   at System.Runtime.ExceptionServices.ExceptionDispatchInfo.Throw()
   at System.Windows.Threading.ExceptionWrapper.InternalRealCall(Delegate 
callback, Object args, Int32 numArgs)
   at System.Windows.Threading.ExceptionWrapper.TryCatchWhen(Object source, 
Delegate callback, Object args, Int32 numArgs, Delegate catchHandler)

Any help would be appreciated.

Cheers,
Sebastien
